# Airmark

> Airmark is a macOS 13+ menu-bar app that adds a text or image watermark to one selected display without blocking keyboard, mouse, or menu-bar access.

## Facts
- Download: https://github.com/anujraja404/airmark/releases/latest
- Develop: npm install && npm run tauri dev
- Build: npm run tauri build
- Stack: Tauri v2, Rust, React, TypeScript, Vite
- Platform: macOS 13+
- License: MIT
- Privacy: local JSON settings, no background server process

## Performance
- No benchmark claims are made on the landing page.

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/anujraja404/airmark
- Author: Anuj Raja <anujrajaceo@gmail.com>
